argus_url.description: Base URL of the argus-redact HTTP server (the redaction sidecar). Must begin with `http://` or `https://` and include a host.

argus_api_key.description: Bearer token sent in the `Authorization` header on each `/redact` call. Must match the `ARGUS_API_KEY` environment variable on the argus-redact server. Use a Kong vault reference (for example, `{vault://env/ARGUS_API_KEY}`) in production.

lang.description: argus-redact language pack to apply. One of `zh`, `en`, `ja`, `ko`, `de`, `uk`, `in`, `br`.

mode.description: argus-redact detection mode. `fast` (regex-only, sub-millisecond engine cost) is the only mode suitable for the request path; `ner` and `auto` are exposed for completeness but their latency profile makes them better suited to async/sidecar deployments than to inline gateway use.

profile.description: argus-redact compliance profile. `pseudonym-llm` emits realistic-looking, reserved-range faked values that preserve LLM-reasoning quality. Other accepted values include `default`, `pipl`, `gdpr`, and `hipaa`.

timeout_ms.description: Per-call timeout in milliseconds for `/redact`. Bounded to `[100, 60000]`.

on_error.description: Behavior when the argus-redact sidecar is unreachable during the access phase. `closed` returns HTTP 503 (default — unredacted PII never reaches the upstream LLM). `open` logs a warning and lets the original request through unmodified.
